artifacts.name: Scene3D Unit & Behavioral Tests
artifacts.description: Unit and behavioral tests for FR-SCENE-001: T-FE-SCENE-001-01, T-FE-SCENE-001-02, T-FE-SCENE-001-03

summary.work_completed: Verified and confirmed the complete frontend test suite for FR-SCENE-001 (3D Scene Rendering) on branch feature/8-scene-3d-rendering. All 3 required test IDs are implemented in src/tests/unit/Scene3D.test.tsx. Tests cover: canvas mount without WebGL errors, OrbitControls presence via R3F internal state, and full-App behavioral test verifying GridPlane PlaneGeometry mesh in scene.
key_findings: T-FE-SCENE-001-01: Verifies canvas element present and window.__legoBuilderErrors empty after mount
T-FE-SCENE-001-02: Verifies OrbitControls via R3F __r3f.root.getState().controls with camera position fallback
T-FE-SCENE-001-03: Behavioral test renders full App (no mocked stores), traverses scene for PlaneGeometry mesh at Y=0
WebGL mock in setup.ts provides complete getContext stub for jsdom environment
beforeEach resets Zustand store and window.__legoBuilderErrors for test isolation
All waitFor calls use 3000ms timeout to accommodate R3F async mount

recommended_actions: Verify Scene3D.tsx implementation satisfies all 3 test contracts
Confirm window.__legoBuilderErrors is initialized in main.tsx (already done)
Confirm OrbitControls mouseButtons={{ LEFT: undefined }} is set (already done)
Confirm GridPlane uses PlaneGeometry with args=[20,20] at position Y=0 (already done)
Run vitest to confirm all 3 tests pass: npx vitest run src/tests/unit/Scene3D.test.tsx
